series_metadata.series_description: Records of public bodies staffed by OBM including the designations, appointments, charters, agendas, minutes, and other related documents of those bodies as required.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for the length of time required by the body or until no longer of administrative value, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for the length of time required by the body or until no longer of administrative value, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
